senses.gloss: pertaining to Muhammad, for example in comparison with other prophets

examples.text: مَا هِيَ بَعْضُ ٱلْفُرُوقِ بَيْنَ ٱلشَّرِيعَتَيْنِ ٱلْمُحَمَّدِيّةِ وَٱلْمُوسَوِيّة؟
examples.english: What are some of the differences between the law of Muhammad and that of Moses?

senses.gloss: being true to the teachings of Muhammad, for example in comparison with other Islamic sects

examples.text: عَقِيدَتُنَا وَحْدَهَا هِيَ ٱلْعَقِيدَةُ ٱلْمُحَمَّدِيّةُ ٱلْأَصِيلة.
examples.english: Our dogma alone is the original dogma of Muhammad.
